verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My boat of life sails on a troubled sea Ever there's a wind in my sail But I have a friend who watches over me When the breeze turns into a gale

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: … I know the master of the wind (ooooh) I know the maker of the rain He can calm the storm And make the sun shine again I know the master of the wind

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: … Sometimes I soar like an Eagle to the sky Among the peaks my soul can be found An unexpected storm may drive me from the heights May bring me low but it cannot bring me down

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let Jesus calm your storm And make the sun shine again He is the master of the wind
